name: overflow-sentinel
description: PoC static analyzer for boundary-check overflow risks in smart contracts

scripts.scan:vulnerable: npm run build && node dist/index.js fixtures/move/vulnerable.move
scripts.scan:safe: npm run build && node dist/index.js fixtures/move/safe.move
scripts.scan:vulnerable:solidity: npm run build && node dist/index.js fixtures/solidity/vulnerable.sol
scripts.scan:safe:solidity: npm run build && node dist/index.js fixtures/solidity/safe.sol
scripts.scan:vulnerable:solana: npm run build && node dist/index.js fixtures/rust/vulnerable.rs
scripts.scan:safe:solana: npm run build && node dist/index.js fixtures/rust/safe.rs
